reviews.review_description: Horrible no fun at all.  I read the reviews and thought it would be a fun game. I was wrong

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you did not enjoy the game! It's an arcarde game inspired by the likes of Space Invaders and Galaga just in 360degrees, perhaps you had different expectations?

reviews.review_description: Thank you for your fast response to my comment.... I look forward to the update to correct the problem that I'm having... I'll give it 5 stars for its past performance it was always one of my favorite games... hopefully it'll be up and running again soon... thanks

developer_response.body:
Hi grandude, We uploaded a fixed version yesterday with the support of Oculus to find the new bug! Thanks for updating your review and if you have any further issues don't hesitate to contact us on our support email: support@headgear.io
Enjoy the improved gun reflections in this version while your blasting those pesky UFOs!

reviews.review_description:
Defend against waves of UFOs attacking from all 4 quadrents. Supports GearVR controller and a good difficulty leave.
Held my attention for 10 minutes? Yes.
20 minutes? No, but will come back later.
S7 Edge: nice use of VR, swivel chair or standing a must! Addictive game play to unlock all with great graphics and sound
Stellar UFO shooter with guns galore, some real tough missions and great 3D graphics. Certainly worth the price tag for repeated playability!

developer_response.body: We're glad you enjoyed the game!

reviews.review_description: It's a decent game for the most part,  I just updated to Marshmallow 6.0 and it works fine,  but all the textures except the Earth are black and the particles are bright white,  it'd be nice to play again,  but it's not playable in its current state. It's a good game otherwise.

developer_response.body: The issue has been fixed since the latest version released 5months ago! Could you please try again and update your review? :)

reviews.review_description: I don't enjoy any game that us autofire

developer_response.body: Hi disabling auto fire is a feature added to the game since the latest version released 5months ago! You can find the option after the tutorial under the gun selection menu on the bottom left once you've selected a planet in the solar map. Could you please try again and update your review? :)

reviews.review_title: Thanks for fixing the S7 bugs
reviews.review_description: Now that I can actually play the game its fun and looks great. Once again thanks for fixing it so us S7 users can enjoy it

developer_response.body: We're glad you enjoyed the game! Thank you for your patience while we fixed that S7 bug with the UE4 engine and thanks for updating your review! :)

reviews.review_description: Had a problem at first with the oculus go, but you guys made an update, and now the game works great. I absolutely love this game! It takes me back to when I was a kid, feeding my entire allowance into a space invaders arcade game, except now I am in the game on my own couch! Thanks for the awesome game, and thanks for standing behind your product and quickly fixing the problem I was having. If I could give you ten stars I would. Keep up the good work and thanks again!

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you tried it again after the Go fix and you enjoyed all the Space Invader references in it :)

reviews.review_description: It glitches within the first min, and they never refund u ur money.

developer_response.body: The crash has been fixed since the latest version released 5months ago! Could you please try again and update your review? :)

reviews.review_description: So if you like arcade style gameplay with a little extra depth check this out i was surprised how good it looks the video doesnt do it justice give it a go its fun BUT it really NEEDS rotation support for controller thats literally the point of a controller TY
